title: Toward Generative 6G Simulation: An Experimental Multi-Agent LLM and ns-3 Integration
venue: International Mediterranean Conference on Communications and Networking
snippet: The move toward open Sixth-Generation (6G) networks necessitates a novel approach to full-stack simulation environments for evaluating complex technology developments before prototyping and real-world implementation. This paper introduces an innovative approach11 A lightweight, mock version of the code is available on GitHub at https://github.com/frezazadeh/LangChain-RAG-Technology that combines a multi-agent framework with the Network Simulator 3 (ns-3) to automate and optimize the generation,
